item.title: Chase Rabideau @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

A professional guitarist and singer of many musical backgrounds, Chase Rabideau is a crowd-centered entertainer with a background in many popular genres. Along with folk/rock centric original music that can be found online, Chase plays over 400 covers in a variety of genres such as rock ‘n roll (50’s, 60’s, 70’s, +more), classic country, folk, R&B, jazz, blues, folk/pub songs from Ireland, (seasonal) Christmas music, and crowd-favorite popular music.

Event details

item.title: The Martini Night Project @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

Local Seattle legendary musicians will be coming together to play some music in our main dining room. Join us to jam out!

Event details

item.title: Mortgage Lifters @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave S, Seattle

Seattle and Vashon Island based band playing original and classic swing pop songs. Kim Thal, Robert Hinrix, Johnny Calcagno, and Tony Mates. Also known in some circles as Radiator Charlie's Mortgage Lifters. Tunes of the Golden Era.

Event details

item.title: The Richard Wilson & Gina Z Trio @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, April 28, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

Join us for in the dinning room to enjoy some tunes brought to you by Richard Wilson and Gina Z!

Event details

item.title: Sarah Bruhner @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, June 9, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

Michigan native, now Seattle-based, Sarah Brunner is a full time musician, both solo and with her band The Hipocrats. With influences ranging from Brandi Carlile, to Sam Smith to The Lumineers, she uses rhythm guitar just as much as a vocal melody to define a song.We are excited to have Sarah at Perihelion from 7-9pm for some lovely live music.

Event details

item.title: Mortgage Lifters @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, September 22, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave S, Seattle

Seattle and Vashon Island based band playing original and classic swing pop songs. Kim Thal, Robert Hinrix, Johnny Calcagno, and Tony Mates. Also known in some circles as Radiator Charlie's Mortgage Lifters. Tunes of the Golden Era.

Event details
